flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Memphis are 15% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($31.2k vs $36.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Memphis fell 34% between 2006 and 2009 (72.2% → 47.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 27 pp at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Memphis vs the 2003–2007 baseline (40.1% vs 67.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tennessee College of Applied Technology-Memphis rose 66% between 2021 and 2024 (836 → 1.4k).
